focus: [D3-A14/D3] routing observability/telemetry: emit routeTelemetry with mode chosen, alias matched, bundle-loaded state, proof verdict, and separate telemetryMissingRate from routeMissRate

graphEvents.label: How can sk-design make parent-hub routing observable enough to measure missing telemetry and actual route misses separately?
sk-design route facts exist in hub prose and mode-registry rows, but no emitted route event carries workflowMode, matched alias, default/defer state, packet, or backend
Context-loaded and proof-of-application cards expose bundle/proof verdicts after routing, but they are not joined to the chosen route
The skill-benchmark observed-result shape, live executor, funnel, and report lack a hard routeTelemetry lane or miss-rate aggregate
Read-only local corpus measurement found 55 prompt-bearing sk-design playbook scenarios and zero machine-readable route telemetry records, telemetryMissingRate=1.000
Resource recall, context proof, proof-card readiness, and utilization credit may score only after a routeTelemetry event is present and valid when expected
Reports must separate telemetryMissingRate from routeMissRate so instrumentation absence is not collapsed into routing defect rate

label: Route facts exist, but no route event is emitted
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE on a test corpus; ADVISORY for open-ended natural-language intent
recommendation: Add routeTelemetry with routeOutcome, workflowMode, workflowModes+roles, matchedAliases, defaultApplied, deferReason, backendKind, and packet to the parent-hub adapter or hub-router replay output.

label: Bundle-loaded and proof verdict exist as late proof fields, not joined route telemetry
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for structured cards/transcripts; ADVISORY for aesthetic quality
recommendation: Attach bundleLoaded and proofVerdict to routeTelemetry so reports can distinguish route miss, context bundle miss, and proof-card failure.

label: Benchmark observed-result shape and funnel cannot compute route telemetry miss rates
recommendation: Add a hard hub-route lane before D1-intra/resource recall with stages for unobserved, wrong mode, alias missed, default forbidden, bundle mismatch, context missing, and proof failed.

label: Local sk-design manual playbook corpus has telemetryMissingRate=1.000
Resource recall, context proof, proof-card readiness, and utilization credit may score only after expected routeTelemetry is present and valid
Reports must publish telemetryMissingRate separately from routeMissRate

direction: Treat route correctness and telemetry absence as one miss bucket
reason: The local corpus currently has telemetryMissingRate=1.000, so collapsing unobserved and wrong routes would hide whether the failure is instrumentation absence or actual routing behavior.
